I think maybe it's just this overwhelming pressure, like I have to be perfect right from the start. It's frustrating because I know I can do it, but then I just end up staring at a blank screen for ages.

patient.query: It’s just that in the moment, it feels like everyone’s watching and judging every little thing I say. I know maybe they aren’t thinking that, but when I stumble or get nervous, it seems like it confirms my fears. I suppose sometimes people might be distracted or just having a bad day, but it’s hard to convince myself of that when I’m caught up in my own head. I just wish I could shake that feeling and focus on what I want to say instead.
